I will NOT touch flush() or find_predictor_for_stream_listeners(). Can you tell me: (1) which exact methods your trace logging touches, (2) whether you're only INSERTING log.debug(...) calls (additive lines) vs restructuring existing logic? If it's purely additive logging calls, our diffs likely won't conflict at the same line numbers even in the same file. Let's each keep edits additive/localized so both patches can coexist.
